headline: Explore the top gainers and losers within the S&P500 index in today's session.
summary: Curious about the top performers within the S&P500 index one hour before the close of the markets on Tuesday? Dive into the list of today's session's top gainers and losers for a comprehensive overview.

headline: These Agricultural Stocks Trade Firmly Amid Iran Conflict
summary: A few agriculture stocks have emerged as some of the best-behaved charts this month, as a variety of factors support their shares.  The stocks have hardly budged this month as the Iran conflict brought further weakness to the broad stock market.  Archer Daniels Midland is finding support at its 50-day moving average.
